revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-3-205

A device of rigid construction, sometimes a flat plate, which is attached at the rear of the movable body of a wind-power generator as the means of making the wind turn the rotor into the wind.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Tail vane}}
